1.tr: Ciddi psikolojik ve mesleki strese yol açılacak.

2.en: Data ought not to be processed.
The sector must not be expanded.
The anomaly may not be detected.
The core will not be stabilized.
The scope could not be clarified.
Modules ought not to be integrated.
The framework should not be inspected.

4.en: Substantial empirical inputs could be modified by the software development team.
4.tr: Bireysel fonksiyonel yazılım modülleri yazılım geliştirme ekibi tarafından değiştirilabilir.
4.blank: Substantial empirical inputs could be ___ by the software development team.

4.en: Substantial empirical inputs could be modified by the revised security protocol.
4.tr: Önemli deneysel girdiler gözden geçirilmiş güvenlik protokolü tarafından değiştirilabilir.
4.blank: Substantial empirical inputs could be ___ by the revised security protocol.

4.en: This unpredictable economic dynamic will be induced by the sudden paradigm shift.
4.tr: Bu öngörülemeyen ekonomik dinamiğe ani paradigma değişimi tarafından yol açılacak.
4.blank: This unpredictable economic dynamic will be ___ by the sudden paradigm shift.

4.en: Valuable qualitative insights may be derived from detailed historical system logs.
4.tr: Değerli nitel çıkarımlar detaylı geçmiş sistem günlüklerinden elde edilabilir.
4.blank: Valuable qualitative insights may be ___ from detailed historical system logs.

4.en: The undetected structural anomaly may be detected by the independent annual audit.
4.tr: Tespit edilemeyen yapısal anomali bağımsız yıllık denetim tarafından tespit edilabilir.
4.blank: The un___ structural anomaly may be ___ by the independent annual audit.

4.en: Alternative scientific hypotheses may be validated by the final scientific finding.
4.tr: Alternatif bilimsel hipotezler nihai bilimsel bulgu tarafından doğrulanabilir.
4.blank: Alternative scientific hypotheses may be ___ by the final scientific finding.

4.en: Hidden organizational system flaws will be exposed by the independent annual audit.
4.tr: Gizli örgütsel sistem kusurları bağımsız yıllık denetim tarafından ortaya çıkarılacak.
4.blank: Hidden organizational system flaws will be ___ by the independent annual audit.

4.en: The initial investigative project can be abandoned by the software development team.
4.tr: İlk araştırma projesi yazılım geliştirme ekibi tarafından terk edilabilir.
4.blank: The initial investigative project can be ___ by the software development team.

4.en: Significant annual financial growth can be anticipated by senior financial analysts.

4.en: Comprehensive legislative tax reform must be advocated by senior financial analysts.

4.blank: Detailed historical system logs can be ___ by the software development team.

4.en: Crucial internal device components will be stabilized by the reinforced central core.

4.en: Crucial technical system parameters should be defined by the revised security protocol.

4.en: Unauthorized user network access will be restricted by the strict institutional policy.
